author: dalcantara7
description: Look for missing linked mentions to the current note and import them into the current note.

manifest.author: Diego Alcantara
manifest.description: Looks for missing linked mentions or notes with a specific tag or alias and imports them into the current note.
manifest.name: AutoMOC

name: AutoMOC

releases.author: dalcantara7
releases.description:
This release adds support for variants of markdown link syntaxes to be detected. Additionally, enhanced support for linking to exclusively preceding headings (rather than just the closest heading) has been added.

Thanks for the contribution @AlicVB!
releases.name: Add support for all markdown link syntaxes and allow linking to preceding heading

releases.author: dalcantara7
releases.description: Addresses the correct adding of notes based on user defined link format by correctly using the `generateMarkdownLink()` function from Obsidian API
releases.name: Fix bug caused by incorrect usage of `generateMarkdownLink()`

releases.author: dalcantara7
releases.description: Resolves #18. Users are now allowed to enable/disable adding links with aliases.
releases.name: Add ability to disable adding with alias

releases.author: dalcantara7
releases.description: This release adds support for ignoring note's backlinks for notes located within specified folders
releases.name: Add support for ignoring notes within specified folders

releases.author: dalcantara7
releases.description: Per feature request #15, add support for importing as a unordered list, ordered list (separated by either period or parenthesis), and checkbox list.
releases.name: Add support for importing as structured list

releases.author: dalcantara7
releases.description: Issue reported in #10. Frontmatter tags are parsed differently based on structure. This release properly handles both forms of the tags
releases.name: Frontmatter tag fix

releases.author: dalcantara7
releases.description:
Main feature request came from #8 (adding support for heading links). This has been implemented.

Additionally, another user has pointed out that frontmatter tags were not support. Support has been implemented.
releases.name: Support for anchor links and frontmatter tags

releases.author: dalcantara7
releases.description: Obsidian 0.14.15 update changed the way the api handles file aliases in the frontmatter. This update handles the new file aliases.
releases.name: Bug Resolution

releases.author: dalcantara7
releases.description:
This release adds the following new features:
1. Inserted links are now organized alphabetically 
2. If a note has aliases, the note will be inserted with the first alias as the link
3. A second command to insert all notes with a given tag has been added. The command opens up a modal that allows you to search for tags, select one, and import all notes with that tag.
releases.name: Update 1: Sorted Lists, Aliases, and Tags

releases.author: dalcantara7
releases.description: First public release of the Obsidian AutoMOC plugin.
releases.name: AutoMOC Initial Release
